Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Kuwaiti F/A-18's Triple Friendly Fire Shootdown Gets Stranger by the Day 32 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc 569 upvotes, 76 comments
  3. FrameBook 489 upvotes, 81 comments
  4. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 739 upvotes, 169 comments
  5. Flash media longevity testing – 6 years later 32 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug 240 upvotes, 58 comments
  7. Linux Internals: How /proc/self/mem writes to unwritable memory (2021) 114 upvotes, 26 comments
  8. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 206 upvotes, 65 comments
  9. Fontcrafter: Turn Your Handwriting into a Real Font 280 upvotes, 93 comments
  10. Restoring a Sun SPARCstation IPX Part 1: PSU and Nvram 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. FreeBSD Capsicum vs. Linux Seccomp Process Sandboxing 59 upvotes, 16 comments
  12. Segagaga Has Been Translated into English 64 upvotes, 18 comments
  13. Reverse-engineering the UniFi inform protocol 69 upvotes, 22 comments
  14. Revealed: UK's multibillion AI drive is built on 'phantom investments' 31 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. The Window Chrome of Our Discontent 85 upvotes, 32 comments
  16. The Finger and the Moon 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025) 547 upvotes, 290 comments
  18. Algebraic topology: knots links and braids 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer 63 upvotes, 26 comments
  20. FFmpeg at Meta: Media Processing at Scale 111 upvotes, 55 comments
  21. No leap second will be introduced at the end of June 2026 27 upvotes, 10 comments
  22. My Homelab Setup 306 upvotes, 204 comments
  23. Unlocking Python's Cores:Energy Implications of Removing the GIL 81 upvotes, 46 comments
  24. US Court of Appeals: TOS may be updated by email, use can imply consent [pdf] 419 upvotes, 320 comments
  25. My “grand vision” for Rust 250 upvotes, 271 comments
  26. The engine of Germany's wealth is blocking its future 133 upvotes, 138 comments
  27. I'm Getting a Whiff of Iain Banks' Culture 14 upvotes, 9 comments
  28. Grammarly is offering ‘expert’ AI reviews from famous dead and living writers 51 upvotes, 73 comments
  29. Ask HN: Can I repurpose a Bluetooth voice remote as input device for a PC? 5 upvotes, 3 comments
  30. Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (March 2026) 238 upvotes, 858 comments

Last generated 12:30am, 10 March 2026. Source here.
